name: clipboard-workflow-helper
description: VS Code extension: Ctrl+C auto-unselect, Ctrl+A+C timeline entry, auto-backup plików (Claude Code compatible)
author: KFG
notes: v1.2: removed ClipboardListener.exe (Bitdefender false-positive) + auto-detect screenshot monitor. Ctrl+Shift+V paste screenshot still works via ClipboardToFile.exe.
